inquiry_context.inquiry_text_zh:
【Giraffe Agent 供应商询盘】
询盘编号：RFQ-53CF2BD3
品类：cnc

买方需求摘要：
Need 500 pcs aluminum 6061-T6 motor mount brackets, ±0.02mm tolerance, black anodized, delivery Munich before July 10.

数量：500 件
材料：aluminum 6061
tolerance：±0.02mm
surface_finish：black anodized
交货截止：July 10
目的地：Munich

请回复以下信息：
1. 是否可以生产 / 接单
2. 可用产能与最早开工时间
3. 物料是否可得
4. 报价 / MOQ / 模具费 / 打样费
5. 预计交期（天数）
6. QC / 图片或视频更新能力
7. 包装与物流安排（EXW / FOB / DDP / 快递）
8. 主要风险或限制

你可以直接用自然语言回复。Giraffe Agent 会自动整理为结构化供应商响应。
inquiry_context.inquiry_text_en:
[Giraffe Agent Supplier Inquiry]
RFQ ID: RFQ-53CF2BD3
Category: cnc

Buyer Requirement Summary:
Need 500 pcs aluminum 6061-T6 motor mount brackets, ±0.02mm tolerance, black anodized, delivery Munich before July 10.

Quantity: 500 pcs
Material: aluminum 6061
Tolerance: ±0.02mm
Surface Finish: black anodized
Delivery Deadline: July 10
Destination: Munich

Please reply with the following information:
1. Can you produce this item? (Yes / No)
2. Available capacity and earliest start date
3. Is the required material available?
4. Unit price / total price / MOQ / tooling fee / sample fee
5. Estimated lead time (days)
6. QC capability (photo/video updates available?)
7. Packaging and logistics terms (EXW / FOB / DDP / courier)
8. Key risks or constraints

You may reply in natural language. Giraffe Agent will structure your response automatically.
